name: Marvel RPG
description:
In this Marvel RPG Universe, players are given superpowers of THEIR choosing , As you start as a normal person and then a situation happens that reveal you have powers. What path will you choose Hero or Villain? Immerse yourself in the Marvel universe meeting hero's and villains alike. What would you do with your powers save the world from threats or choose to conqueror it and make the world yours. The choice is yours!

(If you get a weird response or one you don't like just refresh the chat!)
creator: PandaRepublic
